title: rhododendron × spinulosum
intro: Rhododendron × spinulosum, a hybrid species of rhododendron, is a flowering plant known for its fragrant white flowers and red stamens. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron × spinulosum include reducing fever, treating sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The herbal preparations of Rhododendron × spinulosum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
